newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. The June 2 interim results / H1 trading update (H1 revenue GBP81.9m +9.1% organic, record GBP167.3m order book +16.5%, net debt GBP37.0m, FY26 in line) and the subsequent ~18% de-rating were all known at the prior case. Nothing genuinely new since.

sources.label: G&H H1 revenue/order book on defence demand

verdicts.rankRationale: Strict latent-node lens: specialty photonics for sensing/inspection/quantum-edge thesis intact. No new RNS since the June 2 interims (record GBP167.3m order book, improving semiconductor backdrop); -0.6% is drift. Small positive carryover from cheaper post-washout entry. Hold.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Record order book and recovering industrial-laser/semiconductor demand on top of A&D strength.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Tariff-linked raw-material supply chain risk and lumpy project timing at a sub-cap photonics name.
verdicts.bull: Record GBP167.3m order book gives near-full FY26 cover; semiconductor recovery and A&D demand support latent photonics optionality.
verdicts.neutral: Diversified photonics with real recovery, but AI-specific exposure is indirect via sensing/inspection.
verdicts.bear: Post-results de-rating reflected margin/mix concerns; tariff supply risks and project lumpiness persist.
